title: Clear Lava and Water
description: This texture pack deletes lava and water overlay (you will see everything in lava and water clearly). Now works with Sodium!
body:
**In this texture pack I deleted water and lava overlay (under lava and water you will see very clearly)**. It's imported from vanilla tweaks resource packs, version for 1.20.5 and higher is edited by me (I combined tweaks with the 1.20.5 vanilla file). This pack works on **1.17 - 1.20.4** on **1.20.5 - 1.21.5** on **1.21.6 - 26.1.2 OR 1.21.6 - 1.21.10 (Sodium) and on 1.21.11+ (Sodium)**. It can help you with searching for ancient debris in nether! Sadly there isn't **Sodium Core Shader Support** version for **1.20.3 and below**, so Sodium is supported only for versions above 1.20.4 ### **There are files which are changing overlay:** fog.glsl (clear lava and water) ### **These mods are not supporting Clear Lava and Water:** Rubidium [Forge] - shaders also don't support this texture pack (except Sodium) - If you're searching for something that works with incompatible mods I recommend installing mod instead: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lava-clear-view - Mod should also work with Rubidium and Optifine. PS: The mod I listed above isn't mine creation!  ## HUGE THANKS TO: Makushimu0 who discovered how to make the pack compatible with Sodium ________________________________________________________________________________________ ### **My new project:**

________________________________________________________________________________________ **Optifine is not required** _You can use this pack in modpacks and your projects, but you can't say that you made it!!! (write credits) I'll be glad if you cantact me and ask me for permision Thanks!_ All bugs report me please!!! ________________________________________________________________________________________ My other useful projects: Texture packs: No Animations (Better FPS, for slower PC): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/no-animations                          Mr. Totem (Antimated Totem of Undying): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mr-totem Mods: Shatr (Adds a lots of funny things, 1.16.5): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/shatr
